zh.lifeSummary: 當Christopher Calthorpe Esquire於1529年出生在英國諾福爾可考可索普時，他的父親Lord James Calthorpe24歲，母親Elizabeth Garneys21歲。他於1556年與Joan Rokewood在英國素福爾可艾尤斯頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1562年4月4日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可考可索普享年33歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可考可索普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christopher Calthorpe Esquire于1529年出生在英国諾福爾可考可索普时，他的父亲Lord James Calthorpe24岁，母亲Elizabeth Garneys21岁。他于1556年与Joan Rokewood在英国素福爾可艾尤斯頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1562年4月4日在英国英格兰諾福爾可考可索普享年33岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可考可索普。

nameMeanings.name: Calthorpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Christopher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Christopher Calthorpe Esquire was born in 1529, in Cockthorpe, Norfolk, England, his father, Lord James Calthorpe, was 24 and his mother, Elizabeth Garneys, was 21. He married Joan Rokewood in 1556, in Euston, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 4 April 1562, in Cockthorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 33, and was buried in Cockthorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christopher Calthorpe Esquire est né en 1529, à Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Lord James Calthorpe, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Garneys, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Joan Rokewood en 1556, à Euston, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 4 avril 1562, à Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterré à Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christopher Calthorpe Esquire 1529 in Cockthorpe, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord James Calthorpe 24 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Garneys 21. Er hat 1556 in Euston, Suffolk, England Joan Rokewood geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 4. April 1562 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Cockthorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Cockthorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christopher Calthorpe Esquire è nato il nel 1529 nel Cockthorpe, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Lord James Calthorpe, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Garneys, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Joan Rokewood nel 1556, nel Euston, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 4 aprile 1562, nel Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 33 anni, e fu sepolto a Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Christopher Calthorpe Esquireが1529年にイギリスノーフォルクコクソルペで生まれた時，父Lord James Calthorpeは24歳，母Elizabeth Garneysは21歳であった。1556年にイギリススフォルクエウストンでJoan Rokewoodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1562年4月4日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクコクソルペで33歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクコクソルペにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Christopher Calthorpe Esquire(이)가 1529년 영국 노르폴크 콕소에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord James Calthorpe(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Garneys(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1556년 영국 수폴크 우스턴에서 Joan Rokewood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1562년 4월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 콕소에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 콕소에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christopher Calthorpe Esquire nasceu em 1529, em Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord James Calthorpe, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Garneys, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Rokewood em 1556, em Euston, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de abril de 1562, em Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 33 anos, e foi sepultado em Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christopher Calthorpe Esquire родился в 1529 г. в местности кокктаурп, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord James Calthorpe было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Garneys, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Rokewood в 1556 г. в местности эустон, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 4 апреля 1562 г. в местности кокктаурп, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 33 лет и был похоронен в местности кокктаурп, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christopher Calthorpe Esquire nació en 1529, en Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord James Calthorpe, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Garneys, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Joan Rokewood en 1556, en Euston, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 4 de abril de 1562, en Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 33 años, y fue sepultado en Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
